llm_advice.rationale: Baseline shows negligible speedup due to multiple ATen launches. Fusing the rank-16 update (B.T @ X then A @ intermediate) into a single custom kernel reduces launch overhead and avoids intermediate memory. Starting with a scalar kernel is low-risk and validates the approach before attempting vectorized or tiled optimizations.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
